blocked_or_404.reason: Page returned related blog posts instead of child links — the article itself is the single content target; captured as custom_widget[0]

Most widget entries on the marketing index page lack explicit <a> href tags (rendered client-side); only 14 widget URLs with actual hyperlinks were captured. A future refresh should supplement from the widgets_help hub which has per-widget help articles for ~80 widgets.
